summary_en: 80,000 shares (2.44% of outstanding) acquired via ToSTNeT-3 on May 22, 2026 at 451 yen/share execution price. Within broader authorization: 200,000 shares (6.0% S/O) up to ¥100M through Sept 30, 2026. Cumulative as of May 21: 43,100 shares, ¥21.1M.
title_en: Notice of Share Repurchase via Off-Market Trading (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief:
Sakurai Ltd. announced on May 21, 2026 the execution of a single-block share repurchase on May 22, 2026 via ToSTNeT-3 (off-market trading). The company will place a buy order at the day's closing price of 451 yen/share for up to 80,000 shares (2.44% of outstanding shares, excluding treasury stock). The order is valid only during the specified trading window (8:45 a.m. Tokyo time) and results will be published immediately after execution.

This block purchase is part of a broader repurchase authorization approved by the board on March 31, 2026, allowing acquisition of up to 200,000 shares (6.0% of outstanding) for a total budget not exceeding ¥100 million over the period April 1 to September 30, 2026. As of May 21, 2026, the company had already acquired 43,100 shares for ¥21.1 million under this authorization, leaving a remaining authorization of 156,900 shares and approximately ¥78.9 million.
